name: Parmesan Pine Cone
recipeIngredient: 1-1/2 tsp oregano, fresh, chopped - or 1/2 tsp dried
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees Fahrenheit. Spread almonds in a single layer on a baking sheet. Toast in the oven, shaking pan once or twice, until almonds are lightly browned, about 7 to 10 minutes. Cool.
2. In a medium bowl or in a food processor, combine cream cheese, Parmesan cheese, mayonnaise, oregano, and garlic. Blend until well mixed. Refrigerate until firm but still pliable, about 1 hour.
3. Place cheese mixture on a serving board or platter and form into shape of a pine cone. Top with toasted slivered almonds to complete the illusion. Serve with crackers.
